bridge_functions.name: NativeMedia.Stage
bridge_functions.description: Stage a local media file under the WebView-serveable assets directory and return a URL that the WebView can fetch directly (bypasses PHP scheme handler)

bridge_functions.name: NativeMedia.Thumbnail
bridge_functions.description: Generate a thumbnail (JPEG data URL) for a local image or video file using native frameworks

bridge_functions.name: NativeMedia.Release
bridge_functions.description: Release a previously staged media file (deletes the staged copy)
